title: Conjecture (Section 9, characterization of 2-extremal digraphs)
statement_text: [Statement unavailable — Section 9 content absent from PDF extraction]
context_text: The paper's main theorem (Theorem 1.8) characterizes $k$-extremal digraphs for $k = 1$ and $k \geq 3$, but the authors were unable to handle the case $k = 2$ (i.e., digraphs $D$ with $\vec{\chi}(D) = \lambda(D)+1 = 3$). The introduction explicitly states: 'in the last section, we discuss the case of 2-extremal digraphs and propose a conjecture for their characterization.'
notes: PDF extraction truncated after Section 2; Sections 3–9 are absent or garbled (only arXiv ID strings appear). The introduction announces a conjecture in Section 9 for 2-extremal digraphs, but the verbatim statement is unavailable.
